name: Catfish in Beer
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown finely-chopped garlic and onion in butter over sizzling heat.
2. Lightly flour the catfish fillets, then add them to the pan with the mushrooms.
3. Pour in the beer and add the juice of half a lemon.
4. Add a couple of drops of Worcestershire sauce.
5. Saute over medium heat, turning occasionally, until brown on both sides.
6. Serve hot on plates with rice. Use the pan-gravy over the rice.
